---
id: handle-create-link
title: "Create a link"
description: "Creates a new short link for the authenticated organization. Respects monthly tier limits. Optionally accepts a custom short code (Pro+), UTM parameters (Pro+), tags, expiry, and redirect type"
sidebar_label: "Create a link"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a link"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/links"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new short link for the authenticated organization. Respects monthly tier limits. Optionally accepts a custom short code (Pro+), UTM parameters (Pro+), tags, expiry, and redirect type

  as={"h2"}
